body: create table if not exists orders (id text primary key, customer_id text not null, currency text not null, total_minor bigint not null, created_at timestamptz not null default now())
create table if not exists order_events_outbox (id bigserial primary key, topic text not null, payload_json text not null, created_at timestamptz not null default now())
create table if not exists consumer_projections (order_id text primary key, status text not null, updated_at timestamptz not null default now())
create table if not exists reconciliation_reports (id bigserial primary key, payload_json text not null, created_at timestamptz not null default now())
decls.name: app.db_ensure_schema_v1

body: insert into crawler_messages(payload_json) values ($1) returning id,created_at
decls.name: app.http_crawler_message_create_v1

body: insert into orders(id,customer_id,currency,total_minor) values ($1,$2,$3,$4::text::bigint) returning to_char(created_at at time zone 'utc','YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS"Z"') as created_at
decls.name: app.http_items_create_v1

body: select id,customer_id,currency,total_minor from orders where id = $1::text
select status from consumer_projections where order_id = $1::text
decls.name: app.http_items_get_v1

body: select id,customer_id,currency,total_minor,created_at from orders order by created_at desc limit 100
decls.name: app.http_items_list_v1

body: update items set name=$2,value=$3 where id=$1::bigint returning id,name,value,created_at
decls.name: app.http_items_update_v1

body: select payload_json from reconciliation_reports order by created_at desc limit 1
decls.name: app.http_reports_latest_v1
